Notice Of Motion To Dismiss For Delay In Prosecution
Off Calendar Jun-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendants John and Janet Finley's motion to dismiss for delay in prosecution is denied. Defendants did not provide 45 days' notice as required by CRC 3.1242(a). While the court does not and should not address the issue of whether the filing of the motion constitutes a general appearance, counsel for plaintiff Niall O'Brien is strongly encouraged to avoid motion practice on this issue by serving the defendants with summons and complaint as soon as possible. Order signed. Judge; Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk
